h1.visual_description: Bold, larger font size, prefixed with Roman numerals (e.g., III.)

h2.visual_description: Bold, larger font size than body text, sentence case, no numbering

h3.visual_description: Bold text followed by a colon, same font size as body text, used for section labels

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Unordered list item for materials, equipment, or sub-instructions

markdown_grammar.math_environment: LaTeX for scientific units and temperatures (e.g., $37 \, ^\circ\text{C}$, $3 \, \mu\text{L}$)

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Header contains 'MOHAVE COMMUNITY COLLEGE' (left) and 'BIO181' (right) in orange/red text above a horizontal rule; Footer contains a centered numeric page number.
